pg111-p1-s1: The first principle of success is that you should never be angry.
pg111-p1-s2:
Even though your husband becomes unbearable and you
have to leave him temporarily, you should, if you can, go without rancor.
pg111-p1-s3: Patience and good temper are most necessary.
pg111-p1:
The first principle of success is that you should never be angry. Even though your husband becomes unbearable and you
have to leave him temporarily, you should, if you can, go without rancor. Patience and good temper are most necessary.
pg111-p2-s1: Our next thought is that you should never tell him what he must do about his drinking.
pg111-p2-s2:
If he gets the idea that you are
a nag or killjoy, your chance of accomplishing anything useful may be zero.
pg111-p2-s3: He will use that as an excuse to drink more.
pg111-p2-s4: He will tell you he is misunderstood.
pg111-p2-s5: This may lead to lonely evenings for you.
pg111-p2-s6:
He may seek someone else to console
him - not always another man.
pg111-p2:
Our next thought is that you should never tell him what he must do about his drinking. If he gets the idea that you are
a nag or killjoy, your chance of accomplishing anything useful may be zero. He will use that as an excuse to drink more. He will tell you he is misunderstood. This may lead to lonely evenings for you. He may seek someone else to console
him - not always another man.
pg111-p3-s1: Be determined that your husband's drinking is not going to spoil your relations with your children or your friends.
pg111-p3-s2:
They
need your companionship and your help.
pg111-p3-s3:
It is possible to have a full and useful life, though your husband continues to
drink.
pg111-p3-s4: We know women who are unafraid, even happy under these conditions.
pg111-p3-s5:
Do not set your heart on reforming your
husband.
pg111-p3-s6: You may be unable to do so, no matter how hard you try.
pg111-p3:
Be determined that your husband's drinking is not going to spoil your relations with your children or your friends. They
need your companionship and your help. It is possible to have a full and useful life, though your husband continues to
drink. We know women who are unafraid, even happy under these conditions. Do not set your heart on reforming your
husband. You may be unable to do so, no matter how hard you try.
pg111-p4-s1:
We know these suggestions are sometimes difficult to follow, but you will save many a heartbreak if you can succeed in
observing them.
pg111-p4-s2: Your husband may come to appreciate your reasonableness and patience.
pg111-p4-s3:
This may lay the groundwork for a
friendly talk about his alcoholic problem.
pg111-p4-s4: Try to have him bring up the subject himself.
pg111-p4-s5:
Be sure you are not critical
during such a discussion.
pg111-p4-s6: Attempt instead, to put yourself in his place.
pg111-p4-s7:
Let him see that you want to be helpful rather
than critical.
pg111-p4:
We know these suggestions are sometimes difficult to follow, but you will save many a heartbreak if you can succeed in
observing them. Your husband may come to appreciate your reasonableness and patience. This may lay the groundwork for a
friendly talk about his alcoholic problem. Try to have him bring up the subject himself. Be sure you are not critical
during such a discussion. Attempt instead, to put yourself in his place. Let him see that you want to be helpful rather
than critical.
